author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Child tables to snapshot: labels (issue_id, label), comments (full row), dependencies (blocker_id, blocked_id where either references our issue), relations (issue_id_1, issue_id_2 where either references our issue), time_entries (full row), milestone_issues (milestone_id, issue_id). Will collect all into Vec structs keyed by issue_id.
